_comment: Travel map destinations. Camp Chilly Wa Wa is intentionally omitted — retro Hokus Pokus Pink does not let the player travel back to camp in Act 1; that beat returns with post-Paris quests. See docs/FIXME.md 'Deferred to follow-up' for when to re-add camp with a relevantWhen gate. `relevantWhen` is an expression evaluated by game/npc_rules.go:evalCondition (supports vars.scope.key ==, !=, &&, ||). When true AND unlocked, the pin glows brightly (= current story destination). When unlocked but relevantWhen is false, the pin only shows a soft halo. Locked pins remain dimmed.

locations.name: Paris
locations.info: Paris, France. City of lights! Home of the Eiffel Tower (1889) and the Louvre museum with over 380,000 artworks.

locations.name: Jerusalem
locations.info: Jerusalem, Israel. One of the oldest cities in the world. Home of the Western Wall and ancient underground tunnels.

locations.name: Tokyo
locations.info: Tokyo, Japan. A city of ancient temples and modern towers. Famous for cherry blossoms, torii gates, and Senso-ji temple.

locations.name: Rome
locations.info: Rome, Italy. The Eternal City! Home of the Colosseum (72 AD), where gladiators once fought before 50,000 spectators.

locations.name: Rio de Janeiro
locations.info: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. Famous for Christ the Redeemer statue, Copacabana beach, and the world's biggest Carnival.

locations.name: Buenos Aires
locations.info: Buenos Aires, Argentina. Tango, empanadas, and the Obelisco at the heart of Avenida 9 de Julio.

locations.name: Mexico City
locations.info: Mexico City, Mexico. Capital of the Aztec empire, home of Chapultepec, tamales, and mariachi.

locations.name: Egypt
locations.info: Egypt. Home of the Great Pyramids of Giza, the Sphinx, and the ancient pharaohs. The Nile River runs through it all.

locations.name: India
locations.info: India. Home of the Taj Mahal, a monument of love built in 1632. A land of ancient temples, spices, and vibrant culture.

locations.name: Thailand
locations.info: Thailand. Land of golden temples, floating markets, and ancient Buddhist monasteries. Known as the Land of Smiles.

locations.name: China
locations.info: China. Home of the Great Wall (over 13,000 miles long!), the Forbidden City, and thousands of years of civilization.

locations.name: Australia
locations.info: Australia. Home of the Sydney Opera House, the Great Barrier Reef, and unique wildlife like kangaroos and koalas.
